caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, large over-ear headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSSES" printed in gold letters across the chest is seated in a studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone attached to a black boom arm. To his left is a white backdrop featuring a repeating vertical logo that says "HUSTLE" accompanied by gold stars. Behind him, a blue banner reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'". On the desk, a black mug with red text that reads "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD" is visible. The man remains in a seated position, looking slightly to his left with a neutral facial expression. There is virtually no movement between the frames, as his pose, gaze, and the surrounding equipment remain static throughout the sequence.
